title: Avoid reflection injection vulnerabilities
description: Reflection APIs can be exploited for injection attacks if user input is used to access classes, methods, or fields. This rule helps prevent attackers from manipulating application behavior or accessing sensitive data by restricting unsafe reflection usage. Always validate and sanitize input before using it in reflection operations.
recommendation: Never use untrusted input in reflection APIs. Validate and sanitize all data before using it to access classes, methods, or fields reflectively.

checks.message: Never use untrusted input in reflection APIs. Validate and sanitize all data before using it to access classes, methods, or fields reflectively.
